title: Anti Tool Break
description: AntiBreak is a client-side mod that prevents your tools from breaking.
body:
**AntiBreak** is a client-side mod that prevents your tools from breaking.

The mod blocks mining and item interactions when a tool’s durability reaches or falls below a user-defined minimum.

Once the durability is above that threshold again, normal interactions are automatically restored.


You can set the minimum durability using                
_/antibreak set <value>_         
or by editing the configuration file directly.

Use                                  
_/antibreak status_                 
to check your currently configured minimum durability.

Links                                    
[Youtube](https://m.youtube.com/channel/UCxrNOoiykeB79j2YrhLze9Q)

[Alternative Courseforge  Download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/anti-tool-break)
